standard_patterns.best_example: Bose — lifestyle hero with person wearing headphones + Save $130 savings callout
Croma — full electronics taxonomy across 10+ categories
boAt — spec icons (50H playtime, 13mm drivers, ENx Mic, BT 5.3) as scannable strip
Sonos — benefit-first announcement: Now playing any song in every room
Bose — 7 color swatches including seasonal colors (Twilight Blue, Ice Blue, Sandstone, Pink)
Bose — 4.5 stars (1,406 reviews) clearly visible near product title

growing_patterns.best_example: boAt — trust strip with delivery/warranty/return icons directly below ATC
growing_patterns.geo_note: India 5/5, US 2/5 — essential for India market

growing_patterns.best_example: Bose — Free 2-Day Shipping (speed AND free combined)
boAt — 71% off display with MRP strikethrough
Bose — $229 was $359, Save $130 — three data points (current, was, savings)

differentiator_patterns.best_example: Croma — full EMI calculator with monthly breakdown + bank offers
differentiator_patterns.geo_note: India 4/5, US 0/5 — critical for India electronics above Rs.1000

differentiator_patterns.best_example: boAt — #1 Earwear Brand; Anker — The World's NO.1 Mobile Charging Brand
boAt/Noise/Portronics — Holi Sale with color splash visuals
Bose — person actually using the product in lifestyle context
Razer — sticky product nav with Overview/FAQ/Tech Specs + green BUY CTA always visible
Razer — quintessential gaming dark + green accents
Nothing — orbital feature cards around central product image
Anker — brand family header (ANKER, eufy, soundcore, ANKER SOLIX)
Croma — delivery/store pickup toggle with 500+ stores across India
Noise — NoiseCash points shown on PDP; Razer — gamified Razer Silver/Gold
Anker — 3D Model tab on PDP, rotate and explore product
Anker — Save $10 auto-applied coupon with Ends in 1 Day countdown
Bose — BoseCare Protection Plan option on PDP

anti_patterns.impact: Erodes trust with savvy buyers — keep discount under 50% for credibility
Nothing uses hamburger-only — acceptable only for ultra-minimal design-forward brands, harmful for mainstream stores
Hides pricing, reviews, and traditional CTA elements — only works for brands with cult following
0% adoption — electronics are purchase items, not replenishment. Subscription feels forced in this category
Nothing and Razer skip reviews — only viable with extremely strong brand positioning, harmful for most stores

unique_innovations: Nothing's Orbital PDP — feature cards orbiting central product image
Anker's Auto-Applied Countdown Coupon — pre-applied discount with live countdown
Anker's 3D Model Viewer — interactive 3D product exploration
Sonos Build Your System — ecosystem sell encouraging multi-product purchases
Razer Silver Giveaway — gamified loyalty with gaming-native retention
Bose's 7-Color Seasonal Palette — seasonal color drops drive freshness
Croma's Multi-Layer Pricing — MRP > Sale > Bank offer > Exchange = maximum savings visibility
boAt's Spec Icon Strip — 50H, 13mm, ENx, BT5.3 in visual icon row
india_specific_must_haves: Trust badges near ATC (warranty, genuine, returns)
Key spec icons (battery, Bluetooth, driver, ANC)
Festival-themed campaigns aligned to cultural calendar
